task: Go to the URL and complete the rich text form by filling in all required fields including the rich text editor. If needed, create a file. Validate that the form was filled and submitted successfully. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/rich-text-form.html
graderReasoning:
The agent successfully navigated to the URL and attempted to fill all required fields. It correctly created a file for upload, selected the country, date of birth, and preferred contact method. The form was submitted, and a success message was displayed by the website. However, the rich text email field was not filled correctly. The agent initially duplicated the email content and, despite an attempt to clean it up, the final snapshot after submission still shows the email field containing 'test@example.com test@example.com' instead of the intended 'test@example.com'. Although the form accepted this input and reported success, the agent did not accurately fill this critical required field as per the task's instructions.

Failure reason: The agent failed to correctly fill the rich text email address field. The final state of the form, as seen in the snapshot after submission, shows the email field containing duplicated text ('test@example.com test@example.com') instead of the single, correct email address. This indicates that a required field was not accurately completed.
